title: runtime: check for pause pid existence
body:
#### What this PR does / why we need it:

drop undesired warning message

#### How to verify it

`podman system reset -f` doesn't complain about moving the pause process

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

Fixes #12065


#### Special notes for your reviewer:
